textByHashes.1d9bcd529eb00bc63d23b968547965c98a8a4695: I go' me sum hot 'wares, mate. Wotcha need?
textByHashes.5690de4710e506506210a15677de00fdfc2f59b8: Ah, frisky nigh' on leave, eh? Betcha furgo' yur missin repor' 'oo.
textByHashes.4e6057401efb2f34760106e3ed6fdcf6536bb928: Well, mate. 'U scratch me back, I stab urs, right?
textByHashes.01e700edb47c1828693429086863dc34b4e3825d: I men' in a good way. I wan' sumpin in exy-change. Ima in need of sum swamp tur.
textByHashes.aad99d90d52f1f8109e1f45db60b5c117dc26c0e: Thas wha' I sed, innit? I need sum feathers 'oo. Foive of 'em.
textByHashes.a4bdb77be2084105848c5bcd2a85dcfdd187e906: Yea, begreat. Then I'll guv yea 'ur stuff.
textByHashes.a88acf678b80d82c3772051f0bf1b060feccafc4: Whers me swamp tur 'n feathers, mate?
textByHashes.bd6d7a6a6a1c714f7e8f118cc68f571f4561992a: I need swamp tur and foive feathers, mate.
textByHashes.201fad9143c27f9351d6cc0c04d7e6df9923bc1b: Nah ain't risky. Bu' I dun run it. Me bruva, Alfredo, does. E runs the Fettuccine Mafia.
